info.name: SIP_CS Backend Demo Collection
info.description: Demo-ready Postman collection for the full SIP_CS backend. Includes a safe smoke-test flow plus grouped routes for Auth, Dashboard, Alerts, Integrations, Sync, and admin tooling.

item.name: 0. Demo Safe Flow
item.description: Tap request an toan cho demo nhanh. Bat dau bang signin de lay token, sau do di theo thu tu request ben duoi.

request.description:
Sign in and receive user profile + token

Accepts `identifier`, `email`, or `username` plus password. Backend resolves email or username without changing the FE contract.

Demo note: Request dau tien nen chay trong demo. Request nay se luu token vao environment de cac request co khoa ben duoi dung lai.
Get current authenticated profile
Readiness probe

List employees

Demo note: Request nay rat hop ly de chung minh baseline 500k ban ghi va lay employeeLookup cho cac request sau.

Get backend-owned executive dashboard snapshot

Demo note: Day la request dashboard quan trong nhat. FE dang dua man hinh chinh tu snapshot backend nay.

Get drilldown rows

Demo note: Request nay phu hop de chung minh server-side filtering tren dataset lon.

Get triggered alert groups

Demo note: Nen chay request nay truoc roi moi chay alert employees. No se luu alertId va alertType vao environment.

item.name: Get employees for one alert type

request.description: Get employees for one alert type
Get integration queue metrics
Get sync overview

Fetch backend-owned OpenAPI contract

Demo note: Dung de doi chieu contract backend-owned. Swagger docs cung doc tu route nay.

Legacy logout alias

Deprecated compatibility alias for older FE callers. Prefer POST `/auth/logout`.
Get current authenticated profile

Revoke the current auth session

Demo note: Nen chay o cuoi demo neu muon dong session dung luong backend.

Sign in and receive user profile + token

Accepts `identifier`, `email`, or `username` plus password. Backend resolves email or username without changing the FE contract.

Demo note: Request dau tien nen chay trong demo. Request nay se luu token vao environment de cac request co khoa ben duoi dung lai.

Register a baseline user account

Always assigns the baseline `user` role, even if roles are sent in the request payload.

Demo note: Chi can test khi muon minh hoa luong dang ky. Se tao them user moi trong MongoDB.

Warning: request nay co tac dong thay doi du lieu hoac trang thai van hanh.

List admin-visible users

Admin-only endpoint. Returns sanitized user summaries without password hashes or persisted tokens.

Demo note: Dung de lay nhanh mot userId cho cac request chi tiet va promote/demote.
Get one sanitized user profile

Create a user from the admin console

Admin-only endpoint. Validates requested roles against the platform allowlist.

Demo note: Chi can test khi demo phan admin console. Request nay se tao user moi.

Warning: request nay co tac dong thay doi du lieu hoac trang thai van hanh.

item.name: Remove admin role from a user

request.description:
Remove admin role from a user

Super-admin-only role mutation with root-admin and self-demotion safeguards.

Warning: request nay co tac dong thay doi du lieu hoac trang thai van hanh.

item.name: Grant admin role to a user

request.description:
Grant admin role to a user

Super-admin-only role mutation.

Warning: request nay co tac dong thay doi du lieu hoac trang thai van hanh.
Get overall backend health
Get integration adapter health
Liveness probe
Readiness probe

List products

Authenticated compatibility module. Returns the current product catalog with canonical metadata.
Get product detail
Search products by name

Create a product

Moderator/admin/super_admin path for the legacy products module.

Demo note: Module nay la legacy. Khong can test trong demo CEO Memo neu thầy khong hoi.

Warning: request nay co tac dong thay doi du lieu hoac trang thai van hanh.

Update a product

Moderator/admin/super_admin path for the legacy products module.

Demo note: Can co productId. Nen bo qua trong demo chinh.

Warning: request nay co tac dong thay doi du lieu hoac trang thai van hanh.

Delete a product

Admin-only destructive operation for the legacy products module.

Demo note: Khong nen chay trong demo chinh vi request nay xoa du lieu.

Warning: request nay xoa du lieu. Khong nen chay trong demo chinh.

List employees

Demo note: Request nay rat hop ly de chung minh baseline 500k ban ghi va lay employeeLookup cho cac request sau.

Get employee detail

Resolves by business `employeeId` first. Falls back to Mongo `_id` only for legacy callers.

Create employee and dispatch sync

Admin-only mutation. Response includes `sync.correlationId` for downstream tracing.

Demo note: Dung khi can minh hoa luong ghi du lieu va dispatch sync. Se tao ban ghi moi o MongoDB va outbox.

Warning: request nay co tac dong thay doi du lieu hoac trang thai van hanh.

Update employee and dispatch sync

Admin-only mutation. Path value is the Mongo document id used by the existing route contract.

Demo note: Can co employeeLookup. Nen dung tren record demo rieng, khong dung lung tung tren record thuc.

Warning: request nay co tac dong thay doi du lieu hoac trang thai van hanh.

Delete employee and dispatch sync

Admin-only mutation. Path value is the Mongo document id used by the existing route contract.

Demo note: Khong nen chay trong demo chinh vi request nay xoa du lieu nhan su.

Warning: request nay xoa du lieu. Khong nen chay trong demo chinh.
Get benefits summary
Get department filter options

Get drilldown rows

Demo note: Request nay phu hop de chung minh server-side filtering tren dataset lon.

Export drilldown CSV

Download a CSV for the current drilldown filter set.

Demo note: Chi nen test neu muon minh hoa export. Route nay tra ve CSV, khong can cho demo ngắn.
Get earnings summary

Get backend-owned executive dashboard snapshot

Demo note: Day la request dashboard quan trong nhat. FE dang dua man hinh chinh tu snapshot backend nay.
Get vacation summary

List alert configuration rules

Moderator/admin/super_admin only.

Demo note: Doi chieu trang thai eventual consistency cho mot entity cu the.

Admin-only operator endpoint. Uses request correlation as fallback when old failed logs lack correlation ids.
